info.title: My Portfolio API
info.description:
Complete API reference for the Go/Fiber-powered portfolio backend.

## Authentication
- **Admin routes** (`/admin/*`) require a session cookie obtained via `POST /admin/login`.
- **Comment POST** requires an OAuth session cookie obtained via GitHub or Google OAuth flow.
- All other routes are public.

## Rate Limits
- Global: 200 req/min per IP (static assets and health probes exempt).
- `POST /contact`: configurable, default 5 req/min per IP.
- `POST /comments`: configurable, default 20 req/min per IP.
- `POST /admin/login`: 10 req per 15 min per IP (brute-force guard).

## HTMX Partials
Many endpoints return HTML fragments for HTMX consumption rather than full pages or JSON. Response descriptions note when this applies.

adminSession.name: session
adminSession.description: Session cookie set after successful POST /admin/login.

oauthSession.name: oauth_session
oauthSession.description: OAuth session cookie set after completing Google or GitHub OAuth flow.

content.description: Markdown content with optional raw HTML blocks.

h-captcha-response.description: hCaptcha token — required when hCaptcha is enabled in config.

HTMLPartial200.description: HTMX HTML fragment (not a full page).

NoContent.description: Empty 200 body — HTMX removes the target element.

ServiceUnavailable.description: Server overloaded or DB not ready.

tags.name: Locale
tags.description: Runtime locale JSON for i18n (en, id).

tags.name: OAuth
tags.description: Google and GitHub OAuth2 login/logout for comment authors.

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Public paginated comments with lazy-load and WebSocket notifications.

tags.name: Blog
tags.description: Public blog listing and post detail.

tags.name: Admin · Dashboard
tags.description: Admin overview, server monitor, and profiler.

tags.name: Admin · Owner
tags.description: Owner profile, image, and resume management.

tags.name: Admin · Blog Posts
tags.description: CRUD for blog posts including media uploads.

tags.name: Admin · Comments
tags.description: Comment moderation: approve, reject, reply, delete.

get.description: Returns 200 when the DB is reachable, 503 otherwise.
Returns the i18n translation map for the requested locale, loaded from web/locales/{code}.yaml.
Full single-page portfolio (hero, about, experience, skills, projects, tech stack, upcoming, blog preview, contact).
Paginated, filterable HTML partial of project cards for the public portfolio page.
HTML partial listing visible upcoming project/announcement items.
Handles Google callback. Creates/updates OAuthUser and sets oauth_session cookie, then redirects to /#comments.
Handles GitHub callback. Creates/updates OAuthUser and sets oauth_session cookie, then redirects to /#comments.
Clears oauth_session cookie and redirects to /.

Returns an HTML partial with paginated top-level approved comments and their replies.

- `page=1` → full `comment_list` container (includes total count header and first 10 comments).
- `page>1` → `comment_batch` fragment (replaces load-more sentinel via `hx-swap=outerHTML`).

Page size: **10 per page**. Protected by circuit breaker.

post.description:
Creates a comment with `is_approved=false` (requires admin moderation). Broadcasts a WebSocket event to connected clients. Returns an HTML `comment_card` partial marked as pending.

Rate limited: default **20 req/min** per IP. Requires OAuth session.

get.description:
Upgrades to a WebSocket connection. The server pushes a JSON event whenever a new comment is posted:

```json
{"type":"comment","data":{"id":42,"user":"Alice","refresh":true}}
```

Clients that detect `refresh:true` can re-fetch `GET /comments?page=1`.

426.description: Upgrade Required — plain HTTP not accepted on this path.

get.description: Renders the public blog listing page. Initial load shows 6 posts; additional posts load via GET /blog/more.
Returns an HTML partial with the next page of blog post cards for HTMX infinite scroll. Protected by circuit breaker.
Renders the full blog post. Markdown is rendered via goldmark (GFM + raw HTML) and sanitized by bluemonday (allows images, video, audio, YouTube/Vimeo iframes).

post.description:
Saves the message to the DB and attempts to email the owner.

Rate limited: default **5 req/min** per IP. Protected by circuit breaker.

With `HX-Request: true` header → returns inline HTML snippet. Otherwise → redirects to /#contact.

get.description: Self-hosted Swagger UI (gofiber/contrib/swaggo). Requires admin session cookie.
Renders the admin login form. Shows hCaptcha widget when enabled in config.

post.description:
Authenticates credentials. Sets a session cookie and redirects to /admin/ on success. Re-renders the login page with an error on failure.

Brute-force guard: **10 attempts per 15 min** per IP. hCaptcha validation runs first when enabled.
Clears the session cookie and redirects to /admin/login.

get.description: Overview page with counts, recent comments, recent messages, and pending moderation items.
Real-time server metrics (CPU, memory, goroutines, requests/s) via gofiber/contrib/monitor.
Full goroutine-aware profiling via gofiber/contrib/fgprof. Example: GET /admin/debug/fgprof?seconds=10

post.description: Slug is auto-generated from title. published_at is set automatically on first publish.
Stores an image and returns a Markdown ![alt](/path) snippet to paste into the content editor.
Stores a video file and returns an HTML <video> snippet to paste into the content editor.
Stores an audio file and returns an HTML <audio> snippet to paste into the content editor.
Stores the file in the uploads/ directory and records its metadata in the DB.

delete.description: Removes the DB record and the file from disk.

get.description: All comments (pending and approved) for moderation.

post.summary: Post owner reply to a comment
post.description: Creates a Comment with is_owner_reply=true and parent_id set to the target comment. Requires the owner's OAuthUser system account.
